SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
select clientCode, market,metric,cdiStatus,cdiStatusUse,countFlag,
hash(concat(
		IfNull(clientCode, "|"), 
		 "|",IfNull(market, "|"), 
         "|",IfNull(metric, "|"),
         "|",IfNull(cdiStatus, "|"),
         "|",IfNull(cdiStatusUse, "|"), 
         "|",IfNull(countFlag, "|") )) as hashkey
from (
select Client as clientCode,
market,
metric,
cdiStatus,
CDIStatus_USE as cdiStatusUse,
countFlag,
row_number() over(partition by Client, Market, Metric, CDIStatus,CDIStatus_USE, CountFlag order by FileLoadDate desc) as rn,
rank() over (order by loaddatetime desc,fileId desc) as Rankn
from PECCDIStatus
) cdi
where rn = 1 and rankn = 1
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
with source_cte as (
select IFNULL(ss.clientCode,dt.clientCode) as clientCode, 
IFNULL(ss.market,dt.market) as market, 
IFNULL(ss.metric,dt.metric) as metric, 
IFNULL(ss.cdiStatus,dt.cdiStatus) as cdiStatus, 
IFNULL(ss.cdiStatusUse,dt.cdiStatusUse) as cdiStatusUse, 
IFNULL(ss.countFlag,dt.countFlag) as countFlag, 
IFNULL(ss.hashkey,dt.hashkey) as hashkey, 
case when ss.hashkey = dt.hashkey then 'existingRecord'
when ss.hashkey is not null and dt.hashkey is null then 'insertRecord'
when ss.hashkey is null and dt.hashkey is not null then 'deleteRecord' end as Source
FROM tempSQLScript ss 
FULL OUTER JOIN  DestinationTable dt 
on IFNULL(ss.clientCode,'') = IFNULL(dt.clientCode,'') 
AND IFNULL(ss.market,'') = IFNULL(dt.market,'')
AND IFNULL(ss.metric,'') = IFNULL(dt.metric,'')
AND IFNULL(ss.cdiStatus,'') = IFNULL(dt.cdiStatus,'')
AND IFNULL(ss.cdiStatusUse,'') = IFNULL(dt.cdiStatusUse,'')
AND IFNULL(ss.countFlag,'') = IFNULL(dt.countFlag,'')
)

MERGE INTO DestinationTable t USING source_cte as  s 
ON IFNULL(s.clientCode,'') = IFNULL(t.clientCode,'') 
AND IFNULL(s.market,'') = IFNULL(t.market,'')
AND IFNULL(s.metric,'') = IFNULL(t.metric,'')
AND IFNULL(s.cdiStatus,'') = IFNULL(t.cdiStatus,'')
AND IFNULL(s.cdiStatusUse,'') = IFNULL(t.cdiStatusUse,'')
AND IFNULL(s.countFlag,'') = IFNULL(t.countFlag,'')
WHEN MATCHED AND  s.Source = 'deleteRecord'  
THEN DELETE

WHEN NOT MATCHED AND s.Source ='insertRecord' 
THEN INSERT (clientCode, market,metric,cdiStatus,cdiStatusUse,countFlag,hashkey)
VALUES (s.clientCode, s.market,s.metric,s.cdiStatus,s.cdiStatusUse,s.countFlag,s.hashkey)
